next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks amount made from service line 'follow-up timeline prototype review' since beginning of Nov 2025; I searched invoices for the service-line text and read all 5 matching invoice files. Date filter is issued_on >= 2025-11-01; all five qualify (2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2025-12-29, 2026-02-14, 2026-03-26). Arithmetic from matching line_eur values: 240+480+240+240+240=1440.

function.rulebook_notes: Used invoice line items (line_eur) for service-line query and summed all matches since start date.
function.outcome_justification: Five invoices contained the exact service line and all are dated on/after 2025-11-01; summing their matching line_eur values gives 1440.
